_readme: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for values that repeat across the site (base URL, hours, phone, NAP, service area, legal name). Edit here, then run: python3 tools/sync.py . Never hand-edit the generated regions marked with <!-- @shared:... --> in the HTML; sync.py overwrites them.
_baseUrl_TODO: Placeholder domain, not owned yet. Set the real domain here and run tools/sync.py to update every canonical, og:url, og:image and JSON-LD across the site.
tagline: We handle the cleaning so you can focus on the workspace.
_phone_TODO: SITE_PHONE. No business number provided yet, so every phone slot is intentionally omitted sitewide. Fill in phone (display, e.g. '(217) 555-0123') and phoneE164 (e.g. '+12175550123'), then run tools/sync.py. It will add the click-to-call links in the footer, the contact page, all six service sidebars, and the LocalBusiness schema telephone in one pass.

serviceArea.phrase: Urbana, Champaign, Rantoul and surrounding areas within 50 miles
